description: GuitarAlchemist ecosystem capability registry — discovery index for cross-repo MCP federation

ix.description: Rust ML/math algorithm workspace — 32+ MCP tools

tars.description: F# neuro-symbolic reasoning agent — grammar weighting, pattern promotion, metacognition

ga.description: C# music theory + AI platform — scales, chords, spectral analysis, trace export

roadblock_resolution.description: Cross-repo strategies for resolving 'unknown unknowns' and chicken-and-egg problems

strategies.name: exploratory-fan-out
strategies.description: When blocked by unknown unknowns, fan out queries to all repos simultaneously
strategies.pattern: ix (statistical analysis) + tars (reasoning/metacognition) + ga (domain knowledge) → synthesize

strategies.name: belief-bootstrap
strategies.description: Use tetravalent Unknown state to explicitly track what we don't know, then systematically resolve
strategies.pattern: Mark all uncertain claims as U → query each repo for evidence → update to T/F/C

strategies.name: dependency-break
strategies.description: For circular dependencies, use ix-pipeline DAG analysis to find the minimum cut
strategies.pattern: Model the dependency graph → find cycles → identify the weakest assumption to break
